Mayaa Bazaar Song Lyrics From Yennai Arindhaal

Kada kada kadojkajan
para para paraakkraman
kada kada kada kadojkajan
para para

Dhisai engilum
en kodi parakkanum.
Buvanam muludhum
en kural olikkanum.
Edhirigal iru paadham
paniyanum.
Saranaagadhi tharum varai
nadunganum.

Adivalaan beemanin maganada
aram tharugira dharumaril
uravada.
sagaudhiranin sangadam
theerppavan.
sagalarum tholum
mannavan thaan ivan.

Yeah...
kada kada kadojkajan

kada kada kada kadojkajan
para para

Anbae en aaruyire
amudhe nee vaa arigae
vaan nilavodum mugilodum

vizhi meedhu vizhi veesi
vilayaadum pennilaa.
Kannae unnai piriyaen
unnai ennaalum naan maravaen.

Anbae en aaryuyire
vandhen naan un arugae
unai paalodum iravodum
vizhi kaanum en kanaa
imai meedhum thuyil meedhum
nadamaadum un ula.

Kanna unnai piriyaen
unai ennalum naan maravaen.

bale
adi nee enakku vendumadi
thangame thangam, thangam.
naan vachcha kannu vaangavilla
thangamae thangam, thangam.

pala muthumani alli varavaa
andha aagaasatha seeraa
tharavaa.

adi nee enakku vendumadi

isai paadi pottrida

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mayaa Bazaar?

The song Mayaa Bazaar conveys themes of celebration and joy, reflecting the vibrant spirit of the movie Yennai Arindhaal.

How does this song fit into the plot of Yennai Arindhaal?

This song captures the energetic moments in Yennai Arindhaal, showcasing the protagonist's lively interactions and adventures.

Who are the singers of Mayaa Bazaar?

The song features the talented voices of Aalap Raju, Krishna Iyer, Priya Subaramani, and Velmurugan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mayaa Bazaar was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his energetic and engaging compositions.

When was Mayaa Bazaar released?

Mayaa Bazaar was released on January 3, 2015, as part of the soundtrack for Yennai Arindhaal.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mayaa Bazaar, the vibrant energy of the song perfectly complements the lively scenes in Yennai Arindhaal. The collaboration of multiple talented singers brings a unique flavor, making it a standout track. The lyrics and music together evoke a sense of celebration and joy, inviting listeners to immerse themselves in the rhythm. This song encapsulates the essence of fun and excitement, making it ideal for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mayaa Bazaar from Yennai Arindhaal is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring a unique collaboration of talented singers. With Aalap Raju, Krishna Iyer, Priya Subaramani, and Velmurugan bringing their voices together, this track is sure to get you moving. The dynamic beats crafted by Harrish Jeyaraj elevate the song to an unforgettable experience.
stanzaMeanings: In every direction, my flag must wave. The whole world must hear my voice. Obstacles must be faced and overcome. Until the sheltering grace is given, I will keep moving.
The one who gives justice is the son of the bee. He resolves the troubles of the wise. He is the king who takes away all troubles.
Oh my love, you are my life. Come, let’s play with the moon and the clouds. The moonlight dances on your eyes. I cannot be separated from you; I will never forget you.
Oh my love, I have come to you. I see you in my dreams, and you dance in my thoughts.
I cannot be separated from you; I will never forget you.
Oh, you are what I need, my treasure. I cannot take my eyes off you, my treasure.
Will many pearls come down from the sky?
Oh, you are what I need, my treasure. I cannot take my eyes off you, my treasure.
The gods and divine beings today bless us with their grace, and the world sings praises in joy.
Let the hearts of people be free from any shortcomings.
